reason:
CLOSE-OUT REASON (Set 090, session 1)

Operator-authorized close of a code-only set (verifier pre-close review scope)
past a single residual blocking finding the operator adjudicated as a
verifiably-FALSE positive. Cross-provider verification ran normally via the API
path across two rounds. Verdict WAIVED.

MANUAL-VERIFY ATTESTATION

- Verifying surface: ai_router `verify_session` (routed API), rounds 1 and 2.
- Verifier model: gpt-5-4; effective provider: openai -- DISTINCT from the
  orchestrator's effective provider (anthropic / claude-opus-4-8); the
  cross-provider exclusion the automated path enforces was satisfied.
- Template: the canonical adversarial `session-verification` template
  (now id session-verification-v2 after this set's version bump); standard
  verify_session route, not a hand-rolled review.
- Timestamp: 2026-07-10 (rounds 1 and 2 run this date).
- Raw verification artifacts: docs/session-sets/090-verifier-preclose-review-
  scope/s1-verification.md and s1-verification-round-2.md (with s1-issues.json /
  s1-issues-round-2.json).

SUBSTANCE (why this is a confident close)

The fix works, proven by dogfood. This set adds a "Review scope" pre-close
carve-out to the verification template so the verifier stops raising the
circular "set-not-closed-at-verify-time" category error that blocked Sets 088
and 089. Round 1 confirms it: that circular finding did NOT appear (it was
present in both prior sets). Round 1's only real finding -- a genuine coverage
gap vs this set's own spec (no runtime load_verification_template() assertion) --
was fixed in flight. Full suite green (2920 passed).

ADJUDICATION (why WAIVED)

The single round-2 finding is verifiably FALSE. It claims spec.md is "corrupted"
with appended template sections (### Your Instructions / ### Materiality /
### Severity anchoring / ### Response Format). Verified false: spec.md is 146
lines, ENDS at "End-of-set deliverables" (last line: "Dogfood evidence: 090's
own verification free of the circular finding."), and contains none of those
sections -- the only "### Review scope" mention is a quoted section name inside a
Step-2 instruction (line 97). The verifier misattributed verification.md's
(legitimately edited) template content to spec.md, which appears near it in the
evidence diff -- a diff-attribution error, not a defect.

Full adjudication: docs/session-sets/090-verifier-preclose-review-scope/
s1-adjudication.md. The operator accepted the adjudication (interactive
selection, 2026-07-10) and authorized this operator-attested close. A follow-up
on verifier reliability for small meta-work sets (trialing gpt-5-5 /
gemini-3-1-pro as verifiers) is noted for separate operator decision.
